Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates the need for anyone to manually read through hundreds of ads, surfacing only the flagged matches with full context so the team can act immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged list to the relevant stakeholder showing every match found, with the exact ad, field, and copy snippet for each flagged phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, audit-ready report directly to the right person, enabling fast review and corrective action without any additional research or digging.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 53 total agents across the board — 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. There were no new agents added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were quiet on the update front, our completed agents continue running and delivering value daily across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, HubSpot workflows, and more. We'll keep pushing forward on the 9 in-progress builds and look forward to sharing new milestones in the weeks ahead!
